description_long: This is a large, multi-section shelving unit composed of two main parts: a wide, five-tiered horizontal shelf system and a narrower, angled side rack with five stepped platforms. The main shelves are supported by vertical wooden posts and reinforced with white metal brackets, providing a sturdy and open structure. The side rack features angled shelves, likely designed for display or easy access to items, and is visually distinct with its stepped, tiered arrangement. The surfaces of the shelves appear to be made of light-colored wood, while the supporting framework is a combination of wood and white-painted metal. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in retail, storage, or public urban environments. The open construction allows for easy visibility and access to stored or displayed items from multiple angles.
description: A large, modern shelving unit with five wide horizontal shelves and a stepped, angled side rack, made of light wood and white metal. Its open design is ideal for display or storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the shelving unit, with both the main shelves and the angled side rack clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and stepped arrangement of the angled side rack, with the main shelves seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main shelves and the angled side rack, emphasizing the open framework and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stepped platforms of the side rack and the depth of the main shelving system.
